final:
module top_module(
    output reg Q,
    input D,
    input clk,
    input sr
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (sr) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
